$>apt-get install keepalived
$>nano /etc/keepalived/keepalived.conf
--
vrrp_instance vrrp {
	state MASTER
	interface enp0s3
	virtual_router_id 1
	priority 100
	advert_int 1
	virtual_ipaddress {
		192.168.0.22/24
		192.168.1.22/24
		192.168.2.22/24
		192.168.3.22/24
		192.168.4.22/24

$>systemctl start keepalived.service
$>systemctl restart keepalived.service
$>systemctl status keepalived.service
